title: I One-Shotted An Entire App With Claude Fable 5 (Full Breakdown)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates building a video editing app in one hour by feeding Claude Fable 5 only screenshots of a SaaS landing page via Claude Code. The model successfully generated functional code including filler removal, clip detection, and subtitle export, though Fable 5 consumes API limits 2x faster than Opus and will be discontinued on June 22.
writeup: Jordan Urbs builds a video editing app in one hour by feeding Claude Fable 5 only screenshots of a SaaS landing page through Claude Code, with no written spec. The model generates functional code covering filler-word removal, clip detection, and subtitle export. Two practical caveats surface: Fable 5 consumes API limits twice as fast as Opus, and it is scheduled for discontinuation on June 22.
